holdings.infoBox: FCUS is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 5.13%, Intel at 4.98%, Western Digital at 4.85%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 4.72%, and SiTime at 4.60%.

overview.description: The Pinnacle Focused Opportunities ETF (FCUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that toggles between large-cap equities and Treasurys, or a combination of both, based on a proprietary model that identifies positive and negative market signals in the US equity market. FCUS was launched on Dec 29, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.
